narrative:
Miami Twp I (precinct in Montgomery County) has 632 registered voters, with 59.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 17.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.9%, a modest Democratic lean of 5.1 percentage points.
